vulnerabilities.description: Cookie authentication middleware appears incomplete - missing visibility on Secure, HttpOnly, SameSite flags and cookie expiration settings. Without these flags, session cookies are vulnerable to XSS and CSRF attacks.
vulnerabilities.fix: Ensure all session cookies are set with Secure=true, HttpOnly=true, and SameSite=Strict or SameSite=Lax attributes.

vulnerabilities.description: JWT validation may not explicitly verify the signing algorithm, potentially vulnerable to algorithm confusion attacks (none algorithm).
vulnerabilities.fix: Explicitly verify the signing method equals jwt.SigningMethodHS256 in ValidateToken(). Reject tokens without expected algorithm.

vulnerabilities.description: SAML implementation imports crypto/sha1 which is deprecated for cryptographic security due to collision vulnerabilities. SAML v2.0 requires SHA-1 for backward compatibility but should use SHA-256 where possible.
vulnerabilities.fix: Prefer SHA-256 for signature verification. If SHA-1 is required for SAML compatibility, document the risk and implement additional validation layers.

vulnerabilities.description: State parameter storage in Redis may not have proper TTL expiration, potentially allowing replay attacks if states are not cleaned up.
vulnerabilities.fix: Ensure Redis state entries have a short TTL (e.g., 10 minutes) and implement automatic cleanup.

vulnerabilities.description: Code snippet is truncated - unable to verify proper token validation, error handling, and context population. Incomplete authentication code is a critical security risk.
vulnerabilities.fix: Review and provide complete authentication middleware implementation for security audit.

owasp_checks.detail: Cannot verify complete authorization checks in truncated cookie_auth.go
Argon2id for passwords is excellent. SHA-1 in SAML is a legacy concern. TLS enforcement not visible.
No SQL injection patterns visible. Uses parameterized approaches in code shown.
Good security patterns (Argon2id, constant-time compare), but incomplete code prevents full assessment.
Cookie security flags not visible in truncated code.
Good password hashing. JWT and OIDC appear solid but incomplete for verification.

critical_fixes:
1. Add Secure, HttpOnly, SameSite flags to all session cookies
2. Explicitly verify JWT signing algorithm to prevent 'none' attacks
3. Complete the cookie_auth.go implementation for full security review
4. Document and mitigate SHA-1 usage in SAML implementation
